questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:Vegetable, Pumpkin, Jackfruit
questions.solution:
Jackfruit and Pumpkin are entirely different . But, both are vegetables.
 

The answer, hence, is B.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
Which of the following answer figures marked as option (A), (B), (C) and (D) satisfies the same condition of placement of dots as in the Question Figure?
questions.solution:
From the option B, we get same condition of placement of dots as shows in question figure.



Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:Judge, Criminal, Thief
questions.solution:
All thieves are criminals. But judge is different.


The answer, hence, is D.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:House, Storeroom, Bedroom
questions.solution:

The answer, hence, is B.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
In the figure given below , what does D represent ?
options: Actors who are not singers
Actors who are singers but not dancers
Actors who are both singer and dancer
Singers who are not actor
questions.solution: D represents Actors who are singers but not dancers. Hence, option B is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:Lethargy, Anxiety, Power
questions.solution:
Lethargy, Anxiety and Power are entirely different from each other.


The answer, hence, is B.

questions.q:

questions.solution:
All thieves are criminals. But police is different.


The answer, hence, is A.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
The diagram shows the survey on sample of 500 persons with reference to the number of males, females and children. 90 represents the group of which of the following persons ?
options: Males , Females
Females , Children
Children , Males
Females , Children , Males
questions.solution:
90 represent the number of persons who are both males and children.



Hence, option C is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:Study the diagram given below and answer the questions.



Find out the number of families which have TV and scooter both but have neither VCR nor Maruti.
questions.solution:
Number 30 lies on the portion common to the figures representing families having TV and Scooters only.
 


Hence, option (A) is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:Husband, Wife, Family
questions.solution:
Husband and Wife are entirely different. But, both are parts of a family.
 

 
The answer, hence, is A.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:Day, Week, Year
questions.solution:
An year consists of weeks, and a week consists of days.
 
The answer, hence, is A.

questions.solution:
Collar and Pocket are entirely different. But, both are parts of Shirt.



Hence, option B is correct.

questions.q:

questions.solution:
Petals form flowers while flowers form bouquet.



Hence, option A is correct.

questions.q: Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:What does the area marked 1 in the figure given below represent?

questions.solution:
Area marked 1 in the given figure represents “All non-European advocates who are honest swimmers.”




Hence, option (C) is correct.

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
Who among the following is Graduate and Housewife but not among Working People ?
options: F
A
G
E
questions.solution:
In the Venn-diagram shown we can observe that G is present in the overlapping part of the circles of 'Graduates' and 'Housewives' but is not present in the triangle of 'Working people'.

It's evident that G is a Graduate and one of the housewives but not one of the working people.

Option C is hence the correct answer.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

options: IV

questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:

questions.solution:
Cap, Tie and Shirt are separate items, entirely different from one another.



Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
Which of the following diagrams best depicts the relationship among Women, Mother and Doctor?
questions.solution:
We know that every mother is a woman but only some (and not all) mothers or women are doctors. Therefore, the following diagram represents the three given classes best.



Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.subject: Logical Reasoning
questions.examName: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide
questions.q:
Directions: Study the following questions carefully and choose the right answer:
Which of the following diagrams best depicts the relationship among Water, Atmosphere and Hydrogen?
questions.solution:
Hydrogen is a constituent of both Water and Atmosphere. Water is present in Atmosphere.



Hence, option D is correct.
questions.source: English and Logical Reasoning Prep Guide

questions.q:

questions.solution:

All dogs and pets are animals.



Hence, option A is correct.
